homepage.heroSubhead: A pan-African holding investing in the sectors that matter most — real estate, outsourcing, agriculture and logistics — with AI woven through every operation.

homepage.thesisQuote: Africa is not an emerging market. It is the market that will define the next fifty years — and it will need new kinds of institutions to build it.
homepage.sectorsSubhead: Four sectors. One thesis: the infrastructure Africa needs, built for the era Africa is entering.
homepage.sectorsEmerging: Emerging focus areas: media, technology, healthcare.
homepage.founderQuote: I am building from Brazil what I want to see in Africa. The distance gives me the perspective; the mission gives me the urgency.
homepage.founderBio: Njih Njoh Keka founded Njoh Group in 2021, operating between Cameroon, Brazil and Spain. His work sits at the intersection of diaspora capital, industrial strategy, and AI.
homepage.footprintHeading: Rooted in Africa. Connected to the world.
